_doc: Decluttr max published values per model id. Refreshed monthly by scripts/refresh-decluttr-comps.py via .github/workflows/refresh-comps.yml. Decluttr is our configured comp for LG phones, LG laptops, and the fallback for Windows laptops (Lenovo/Dell/HP/Acer/Asus). Frontend reads this at runtime and falls back to COMP_SOURCES percentage if the model id isn't here.
